characters.appearance: Young woman, fair complexion, dark curly hair tied up. Features are natural.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt with a black graphic, silver chain necklace, small hoop earrings.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable pain point: studying English for years but still lacking the confidence to speak in real-world situations.
- Dismisses traditional, ineffective methods like rote grammar learning and coaching classes.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution featuring an AI tutor for real conversation practice.
- Delivers an emotional payoff of finally speaking English without hesitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैंने English बोलने का CONFIDENCE कैसे पाया [How I FINALLY found CONFIDENCE in speaking English]
POV: स्कूल में 10 साल English पढ़ी, फिर भी कैफे में कॉफी ऑर्डर करने में डर लगता है 💀 [POV: Studied English for 10 years in school, still scared to order coffee in a cafe 💀]
Grammar books? पढ़ लीं। Coaching? जा कर देख लिया। Result = Zero. [Grammar books? Read them. Coaching? Tried it. Result = Zero.]
फिर मुझे Supernova ऐप मिली और सब बदल गया... Game-Changer. [Then I found the Supernova app and everything changed... Game-Changer.]
Supernova में AI tutor के साथ आप असली बातचीत practice कर सकते हैं। आप बोलते हैं, AI जवाब देता है, और आपकी English बेहतर होती है। [On Supernova, you can practice real conversations with an AI tutor. You speak, AI responds, and your English gets better.]
कुछ ही महीनों में, अब मैं बिना झिझक English बोलती हूँ। सच में! [In just a few months, I now speak English without hesitation. Really!]
